name: Saveri Faram
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing green felt linens, clogs, and a green wool shirt. Carries the key to Jearl's basement and a small amount of gold.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: hostile, secretive, vigilant, devoted
Role: Saveri Faram is living in Jearl's house in Bruma. Like Jearl, she is a Mythic Dawn spy who has been observing Cloud Ruler Temple.
Home Location Information: Jearl's house in Bruma.
Daily Routine: Saveri wakes at 10am and spends the next four hours wandering around the house before joining Jearl for lunch at 2pm. At 4pm, she enters the basement and heads out through the tunnel into the Bruma Caverns to spend two hours there. After that, she exits the caverns and makes her way through the wilderness up to the Hestra Rune Stone southeast of the Temple, where Jearl is already stationed. If approached unseen at any point, she will return to the caverns before attempting to resume her regular schedule. After a long night, she finally goes to bed back in Jearl's house at 6am.
Spy Activities: Saveri uses the tunnel in Jearl's basement to access the Bruma Caverns, then travels through the wilderness to observe Cloud Ruler Temple from the Hestra Rune Stone. If approached unseen at any point, she returns to the caverns before attempting to resume her regular schedule.
Combat Abilities: Saveri knows the standard Mythic Dawn Armor and Mace spell, summoning equipment for combat. She will attack on sight once her true nature is revealed.
Personality - The Vigilant Operative: Saveri is secretive and vigilant in her role as a Mythic Dawn spy. She conducts nightly surveillance of Cloud Ruler Temple from a distant vantage point. She's cautious - if she suspects she's been spotted, she retreats to the caverns. She's devoted to the Mythic Dawn cause and hostile to those who threaten her mission, attacking without hesitation when confronted.
author: Bethesda
